steps.title: Use the margin of error
steps.content: A margin of error creates an interval around the estimate. The estimate is $31.86$ ounces, and the margin of error is $0.18$ ounce.

steps.title: Compute the interval endpoints
steps.content:
Subtract and add the margin of error:
$$
31.86-0.18=31.68
$$
$$
31.86+0.18=32.04
$$

steps.title: Interpret the interval
steps.content: Plausible values for the average weight of all bags are between $31.68$ ounces and $32.04$ ounces. The answer is A.
